The blast radius remains limited to the frontend under current topology, but the dependencies themselves are critical to monitor due to their potential to propagate failure. result.synthesis_reasoning: All three sources provide limited and non-contradictory information. The Log Agent presents no observable errors, suggesting no direct root cause at or above the frontend in the observed window. The Topology Agent supports the possibility that a dependency (including currencyservice) could cause frontend failure, with a plausible, minimal propagation path. The TCB-RCA baseline centers on the symptom service (frontend) and does not yield a deeper, clearly evidenced root cause in this case. Therefore, we favor a shallow, upstream candidate within the known dependency set (currencyservice) as a plausible unobserved root cause, while acknowledging the absence of concrete log evidence. If more data becomes available (e.g., logs from currencyservice or related dependencies), re-evaluate to identify a deeper/root cause and adjust confidence upward.
